title: 100% Honest Breakdown of my SaaS Journey: $1.3K MRR and $6000 in ad spend (just launched 2 weeks ago)
summary: So before i begin, some background about me: Been a marketer for 7+ years and never worked in Saas before (this is my first attempt!) Experience is mostly in B2C ecommerce, SEO, and online marketing Been doing some web design side gigs here and there Just launched a saas product exactly 2 weeks ago Now, with Claude, anyone can pretty much build anything as long as they are somewhat tech savvy.
